zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Harrington於1470年出生在英國盧特藍德艾可頓時，他的父親Robert De Harrington25歲，母親Mathilde Maud Prisett20歲。他於大約1485年與Lady Alice Southhill在英國英格蘭薩默塞特凱爾斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1524年11月5日在英國薩默塞特凱爾斯頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特凱爾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Harrington于1470年出生在英国盧特藍德艾可頓时，他的父亲Robert De Harrington25岁，母亲Mathilde Maud Prisett20岁。他于大约1485年与Lady Alice Southhill在英国英格兰薩默塞特凱爾斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1524年11月5日在英国薩默塞特凱爾斯頓享年54岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特凱爾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Harrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herington
meanings: English: variant of   Harrington   or   Herrington  .

variants.name: Herrington
meanings: habitational name from Heronden in Tenterden (Kent) or Herrington in Houghton (Durham). The Kent placename may derive from an Old English personal name Hȳra + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘pasture’, while the Durham placename may come from Old English hæring ‘rocky place’ (from hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + the placename forming suffix -ing) or hæren ‘rocky’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Arrington
meanings: variant of Harrington with loss of initial H-.
possibly a habitational name from Arrington, a place in Cambridgeshire, named from an Old English byname, Earn(a), meaning ‘eagle’ + -inga- ‘people or followers of’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Harrington was born in 1470, in Exton, Rutland, England, his father, Robert De Harrington, was 25 and his mother, Mathilde Maud Prisett, was 20. He married Lady Alice Southhill about 1485, in Kelston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 November 1524, in Kelston, Somerset, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Kelston, Somerset, England.

fr.Witham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Englan: Witham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Harrington est né en 1470, à Exton, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Harrington, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Maud Prisett, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Southhill environ 1485, à Kelston, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1524, à Kelston, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Kelston, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.Witham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Englan: Witham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Harrington 1470 in Exton, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Harrington 25 und seine Mutter Mathilde Maud Prisett 20. Er hat um 1485 in Kelston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Lady Alice Southhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. November 1524 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Kelston, Somerset, England und wurde in Kelston, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Harrington è nato il nel 1470 nel Exton, Rutland, England, il suo padre, Robert De Harrington, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde Maud Prisett, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Southhill circa 1485, nel Kelston, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 novembre 1524, nel Kelston, Somerset, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Kelston, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Harringtonが1470年にイギリスルトランドエクストンで生まれた時，父Robert De Harringtonは25歳，母Mathilde Maud Prisettは20歳であった。約1485年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトケルストンでLady Alice Southhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1524年11月5日にイギリスソメルセトケルストンで54歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトケルストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Harrington(이)가 1470년 영국 루틀랜드 스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Harrington(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde Maud Prisett(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 켈스턴에서 Lady Alice Southhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 11월 5일 영국 서머세트 켈스턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 켈스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Harrington nasceu em 1470, em Exton, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert De Harrington, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Maud Prisett, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Southhill aproximadamente 1485, em Kelston, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1524, em Kelston, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Kelston, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.Witham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Englan: витам он т хилл, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Harrington родился в 1470 г. в местности экстон, рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert De Harrington было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Maud Prisett, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Southhill около 1485 г. в местности келстон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 ноября 1524 г. в местности келстон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности келстон, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Alice Southhill aproximadamente 1485, en Kelston, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1524, en Kelston, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Kelston, Somerset, Inglaterra.
